response.overview: A man who desires to change his life grabs the opportunity when he finds a strange statue that he thinks gives him a new purpose and many so-called followers. Yet things begin to spin out of control when it is no longer just his life, but also those around him, who are affected by his actions. Watch how he discovers the true miracle of God during the darkest times of his life.  "Kahoy" is the latest full-length movie produced by CEBSI Films.
response.title: Kahoy
